case_title: SUMEET S PANNU VS. DESIGN EVEREST INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE:UTSAV MUKHERIEE] FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANNU, SUMEET S AS TO DEFENDANT DESIGN EVEREST INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PANNU, SUMEET S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESIGN EVEREST INC. $9,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **RETURNED, UNOPENED, WITHOUT THE GREEN RETURN RECEIPT CARD ATTACHED** COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DESIGN EVEREST INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PANNU, SUMEET S

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF SUMEET PANNU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DESING EVEREST INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY PANNU, SUMEET S AS TO DEFENDANT DESIGN EVEREST INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-25-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DESIGN EVEREST INC.
